chapter_title: Permits for Oversize or Overweight Vehicles
text:
In this subchapter, “authority” means the regional mobility authority authorized to issue permits under Section 623.363 (Issuance of Permits) .

Redesignated from Transportation Code, Section 623.321 (Permit) by Acts 2015, 84th Leg., R.S., Ch. 1236 (S.B. 1296 ), Sec. 21.001 (Definitions) (61), eff. September 1, 2015.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 623. Permits for Oversize or Overweight Vehicles
##### § 623.362 — Definition

In this subchapter, “authority” means the regional mobility authority authorized to issue permits under Section 623.363 (Issuance of Permits) .

Redesignated from Transportation Code, Section 623.321 (Permit) by Acts 2015, 84th Leg., R.S., Ch. 1236 (S.B. 1296 ), Sec. 21.001 (Definitions) (61), eff. September 1, 2015.

*Acts 2015, 84th Leg., R.S., Ch. 1236 (S.B.1296), Sec. 21.002(32), eff. September 1, 2015.*
